title: Vue and TypeScript Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of reactivity typing (ref<T>), typing props with defineProps, and enhanced IDE support.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primary benefit of using TypeScript with Vue?
options: Static type checking to catch errors early.
Replacing the need for state management.

questions.question: Which and/or what attribute should you use on the <script> tag to enable TypeScript in a Vue Single File Component (SFC)?
How do you give a 'ref()' a specific type in Vue with TypeScript?
How do you define typed props when using <script setup> in Vue 3 and TypeScript?
options: Passing a JSON object to the component.

questions.question: Vue with TypeScript allows you to build truly type-safe applications by catching errors before they ever reach the user's browser.
